title: Jal Shey Neophyte
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Jal Shey Neophyte''' was the lowest rank in the [[Jal Shey]] order and the equivalent of a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] or [[Youngling/Legends|youngling]] in the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. They studied with their mentors until they were ready to accept investigative and diplomatic missions of their own.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{Mo}}

==Sources==
